design_philosophy.core_loop: Navigate the Cool World hub, avoid Popper Police arrests, manage currency (nickels), arrange date with Holli Would by completing prerequisites across multiple locations
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Law enforcement evasion and resource scarcity—staying out of trouble while gathering funds and items for progression
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Control Jack Deebs navigating a cartoon world, avoiding consequences, and pursuing a romantic subplot
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Unusual blend of adventure/exploration with consequence-based gameplay (arrest mechanics, bail system) rather than pure action platforming. Non-linear progression gated by inventory and location prerequisites. Movie tie-in that diverges significantly from other platform versions by emphasizing exploration and dialogue over combat

difficulty.continues_system: Arrest mechanic: breaking law results in detention by Detective Frank Harris, requiring bail payment (10 coins typical) or lecture
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: High agency—player controls lawbreaking frequency and manages finances to avoid bail penalties. Progression pacing controlled by resource collection and location unlocking

progression.upgrade_system: Currency accumulation (nickels) enabling item purchases at pawn shop; candy collection gates entry to malt shop
progression.unlock_mechanism: Location-based prerequisites: must arrange date at Slash Club before accessing Holli's apartment; inventory requirements for restricted venues
replayability_hooks: Multiple pathways to acquire nickels (Las Vegas)
Banking system for coin management creates tactical decisions
Consequence system (arrests) adds emergent replay variation

world_building_techniques: Location-based narrative (Las Vegas, pawn shop, Slash Club, Holli's apartment)
NPC interactions (Detective Frank Harris, Holli Would)
Economic worldbuilding through currency and commerce systems
Environmental design signaling theme (cartoon police, dating mechanics)

danger_signals: Popper Police presence triggers arrest mechanic
environmental_storytelling: Cool World bank establishes currency economy
Slash Club represents social hub and progression gate
Holli's apartment exterior platforming suggests physical barrier to romantic goal
